name: mcp-google-ads-mcp-by-trueclicks
description: Google Ads MCP by TrueClicks enables your AI (like Claude) to securely access and query your Google Ads account data. It supports both Windows and macOS, including Intel and ARM-based systems. It connects AIs to Google Ads using GAQL.app as a backend.

author.name: Google Ads MCP by TrueClicks MCP
